/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/absl_invoke_test.dir/invoke_test.cc.o -o ../../bin/absl_invoke_test  ../strings/libabsl_strings.a ../../lib/libgmock.a ../../lib/libgtest_main.a ../strings/libabsl_strings_internal.a ../strings/libabsl_string_view.a libabsl_base.a libabsl_spinlock_wait.a -lrt ../numeric/libabsl_int128.a libabsl_throw_delegate.a libabsl_raw_logging_internal.a libabsl_log_severity.a ../../lib/libgtest.a
